nasb.text: Water encompassed me to the point of death. The great deep engulfed me, Weeds were wrapped around my head.

esv.text: The waters closed in over me to take my life; the deep surrounded me; weeds were wrapped about my head

cnv.text: 眾水包圍我，幾乎置我於死地； 深淵環繞我； 海草纏裹我的頭。

ccb.text: 波涛环绕我， 深渊吞没我， 海草缠绕着我的头。

csbs.text: 众水缠绕我，直至我的脖子； 深渊围绕我，海草缠住我的头。
